PnC_contract_certificate_status.comment: This data indicates the status of the contract certificate that has been installed in the PLC.

PnC_V2G_Root_certificate_status.comment: This data indicates the status of the V2G root certificate that has been installed in the PLC.

PnC_OEM_Provisioning_certificate_status.comment: This data indicates the status of the OEM Provisioning certificate that has been installed in the PL

PnCCertifInstallTrigger.comment: status of installation trigger that PLC receives from IVC to install different certificates.

PnC_IVC_Transfer_Status.comment: data indicates the transfer status of different certificates from the IVC to PLC.

MO Sub CA Certificate availability.comment: data indicates if the Mobility operator sub CA certificate is stored in PLC or not.

TLS Failure.comment: data indicates if the transport layer security is switched off during the V2G communication

P&C OEM Root certificate availability.comment: data indicates if the Plug and Charge OEM root certificate is stored in PLC or not

Legacy OEM Root certificate availability.comment: data indicates if the Legcay OEM root certificate is stored in PLC or not.

Expiry date threshold.comment: data carries the number of days before the expiry date of contract certificate to alert the customer

ToggleActivation.comment: activate or deactivate the toggle validation process

EF_EP_Limit.comment: EP_Max limit defines  maximum attenuation allowed to be categorised into  "EVSE found"

EP_Max.comment: EP_Max limit defines maximum attenuation allowed to be categorised into "EVSE Potentially found"

Issuer_Organization Unit.comment: Sub unit of the issuing authority
